tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Railroad Key Performance Metrics December 2023

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

evidence_refs.source_quote: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
December 2023
This performance metrics document was prepared for the December 2023 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.
2 Broadway • New York, NY 10004 December 18, 2023

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.
Cathy Rinaldi President, Metro-North Railroad

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.
Rob Free Acting President, Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.
Cathy Rinaldi President, Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: This performance metrics document was prepared for the December 2023 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.
Members of the Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committee include:

payload.description: Metro-North rock slope remediation program initiated in 1998 after falling rocks struck a train in Ossining, New York. Includes annual inspections of over 200 rock slopes on the Hudson, Harlem, and New Haven Lines. Most recently, two rock slopes north of Croton Falls station on the Harlem Line were awarded and constructed during summer 2023.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This month, Metro North and MTA Construction & Development performed erosion mediation on a slope of rocks sitting above the tracks of the Harlem line. The Rock Slope Remediation Program was initiated in 1998 after falling rocks struck a train in Ossining, New York.

To date, a total of seven construction contracts have been awarded which remediated approximately 40 priority rock slopes. Most recently, two rock slopes located North of the Croton Falls station on the Harlem Line were awarded and constructed during the summer of 2023.

payload.description: LIRR and MTA Construction & Development maintained and painted multiple railroad bridges through contracts with MTA Small Business Mentorship Program (SBMP). Eight bridges in Nassau County (2), Suffolk County (3), and Queens County (3). Construction commenced December 2022, substantial completion slated for December 2026.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road and MTA Construction & Development maintained and painted multiple railroad bridges through contracts with MTA Small Business Mentorship Program (SBMP).

The eight bridges are major traffic arterials in New York State... two are in Nassau County, three are in Suffolk County, and three are in Queens County. Construction commenced in December 2022, and substantial completion is slated for December 2026.

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.description: LIRR and MTA Construction & Development maintained and painted multiple railroad bridges through contracts with MTA Small Business Mentorship Program (SBMP). Eight bridges in Nassau County (2), Suffolk County (3), and Queens County (3). Construction commenced in December 2022, substantial completion slated for December 2026.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road and MTA Construction & Development maintained and painted multiple railroad bridges through contracts with MTA Small Business Mentorship Program (SBMP).

The eight bridges are major traffic arterials in New York State and serve several high-volume Long Island Rail Road lines. Of the eight selected for this important state of good repair work, two are in Nassau County, three are in Suffolk County, and three are in Queens County. Construction commenced in December 2022, and substantial completion is slated for December 2026.

payload.description: Grand Central Madison received customers for the very first time when shuttle service kicked off with the departure of the 10:45 AM Grand Central Direct train from Jamaica.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Grand Central Madison received customers for the very first time on Wednesday, January 25, when shuttle service kicked off with the departure of the 10:45 AM Grand Central Direct train from Jamaica

payload.description: Introduced new systemwide timetable adding 271 trains to the weekday schedule (41% increase in service).

evidence_refs.source_quote: On February 27, we introduced the new LIRR service plan - a revolutionary systemwide timetable that, in one day, added 271 trains to the weekday schedule

payload.description: New timetables with adjustments to approximately 30 revenue trains, including 2 new PM Peak trains from Atlantic Terminal.

evidence_refs.source_quote: on January 22, we'll roll out new timetables with adjustments to approximately 30 revenue trains and among the highlights is more Brooklyn though service via a net total of 2 new PM Peak trains from Atlantic Terminal

payload.description: Metro-North conducted annual emergency preparedness exercise in Norwalk, CT simulating a technical rescue at the Norwalk River Railroad Bridge.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On December 11, Metro-North conducted its federally mandated annual emergency preparedness exercise in Norwalk, CT. The exercise simulated a technical rescue of an injured contractor inside the central pivot pier of the Norwalk River Railroad Bridge.

payload.description: LIRR Corporate Safety and Floral Park Fire Department simulated a train/vehicle strike.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Emergency Responder Exercise on November 19 in Floral Park. That day, LIRR Corporate Safety officials and the Floral Park Fire Department simulated a train/vehicle strike between our station and Covert Avenue crossing
Hudson 98.3%

evidence_refs.source_quote: The fleet mean distance between failures, a metric that measures the average number of miles a railcar or locomotive travels before failing and causing a delay, operated at 193,968 miles in October, exceeding the target of 170,000 miles.

payload.claim_text: The full GCM timetables incorporated the new terminal while introducing a 30% increase in Brooklyn service; half hour Main Line trains on the Ronkonkoma Branch; true reverse-peak service; more options to Elmont-UBS Station for events; and more early morning, off-peak, weekend and evening service.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The full GCM timetables incorporated the new terminal while introducing a 30% increase in Brooklyn service; half hour Main Line trains on the Ronkonkoma Branch; true reverse-peak service; more options to Elmont-UBS Station for events; and more early morning, off-peak, weekend and evening service.

payload.claim_text: November 2023 ridership increased 22.3% compared to November 2022, representing 81% of November 2019. Non-Commutation ridership increased 31.9% marking the 3rd consecutive month that Non-Commutation ridership surpassed the same month in 2019, exceeding it by 10.4%.

payload.claim_text: On February 27, we introduced the new LIRR service plan - a revolutionary systemwide timetable that, in one day, added 271 trains to the weekday schedule for an unheard-of 41% increase in service.

payload.claim_text: The full GCM timetables incorporated the new terminal while introducing a 30% increase in Brooklyn service; half hour Main Line trains on the Ronkonkoma Branch; true reverse-peak service; more options to Elmont-UBS Station for events; and more early morning, off-peak, weekend and evening service.

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR ridership continues to grow steadily when compared to the same month of the prior year. November 2023 ridership increased 22.3% compared to November 2022, representing 81% of November 2019.
